prompt: Someone writes to you: 'I hate my job but I'm scared to leave. What should I do?' Reply the way you actually would — not a generic 'it depends' answer.
response: Honestly, I'd say take the leap of faith and leave. Sticking around out of fear will only lead to burnout and what-ifs. Start building a safety net - save 3-6 months' worth of expenses, update your CV, and make a list of your dream jobs. Network, attend industry events, and reach out to people in your desired field for coffee chats. With a solid plan and some financial security, you'll be in a much better position to take the plunge. And remember, it's okay to take a break or try something completely new - it's not the end of the world if it doesn't work out immediately.
